entities.name: LEGUMES
entities.description: General category of crops analyzed for gender productivity gaps in Malawi

entities.name: MALAWI
entities.description: The country where the agricultural productivity study was conducted

entities.name: SUB-SAHARA AFRICA
entities.description: The broader region characterized by low agricultural productivity

entities.name: OAXACA–BLINDER DECOMPOSITION METHOD
entities.description: A statistical method used to decompose the gender gap into endowment and structural effects

entities.name: GENDER GAP
entities.description: The difference in agricultural productivity between male and female farmers

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of output efficiency in farming

entities.name: ENDOWMENT EFFECT
entities.description: The part of the gender gap caused by observable differences in factors of production

entities.name: STRUCTURAL EFFECT
entities.description: The unexplained part of the gender gap caused by differences in returns to observed factors

entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: A specific legume crop analyzed for gender productivity gaps

entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: A specific legume crop analyzed for gender productivity gaps

entities.name: PRODUCTIVE INPUTS
entities.description: Factors of production whose unequal access contributes to the gender gap

relationships.description: The study analyzes the gender gap in legume production in Malawi
Used to analyze and decompose the gender gap
Decomposes the gender gap into the endowment effect
Decomposes the gender gap into the structural effect
A significant gender gap was found in groundnut productivity
The gender gap in pigeonpea productivity was not statistically significant
The endowment effect is driven by access to productive inputs
Access to inputs is a major contributor to the gender gap in groundnut productivity
Groundnut is a type of legume
Pigeonpea is a type of legume
Malawi is located within Sub-Sahara Africa
The gender gap is a difference in agricultural productivity
